nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Garlande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English gerlond, ger(e)land, garlond ‘metal chaplet, crown, coronet; wreath’, probably a nickname denoting a habitual wearer of such items, or a metonymic occupational name for a maker of them.

English: perhaps from the Old French personal name Gerland (ancient Germanic Garuland, probably from garw- ‘war-gear; prepared(ness)’ + land ‘land’; the first element of the French name may instead be from a name beginning with gēr ‘spear’).

English: topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + lond ‘land’ (Old English gāra + land, lond), for someone who lived ‘(at the) triangular piece of land’. Compare Garfield .

variants.name: Gerland
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, originally a byname from örlendr ‘foreigner, stranger’.

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived near a triangular field, from Old English gār ‘triangular piece of land’ + feld ‘open country’.

variants.name: Gartland
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Garland  .
Irish (northern Leinster and southern Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Mac Gearnúin, a patronymic from the Norman personal name Gernon .

en.lifeSummary: When William of Garlande was born before 1045, in France, his father, Anseau Adam de Garlande, was 20 and his mother, Eustachie Montlhery, was 19. He married Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery before 1069, in France. He died in 1095.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William of Garlande est né avant 1045, à France, son père, Anseau Adam de Garlande, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eustachie Montlhery, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery avant 1069, à France. Il est décédé en 1095.

de.lifeSummary: Als William of Garlande vor 1045 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anseau Adam de Garlande 20 und seine Mutter Eustachie Montlhery 19. Er hat vor 1069 in Frankreich Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery geheiratet. Er starb 1095.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William of Garlande è nato il prima del 1045 nel Francia, il suo padre, Anseau Adam de Garlande, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Eustachie Montlhery, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery prima del 1069, nel Francia. Morì nel 1095.

ja.lifeSummary: William of Garlandeが1045年以前にフランスで生まれた時，父Anseau Adam de Garlandeは20歳，母Eustachie Montlheryは19歳であった。1069年以前にフランスでNe DE ROCHEFORT De Montlheryと結婚した。彼は1095年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Garlande(이)가 1045년 이전 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anseau Adam de Garlande(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachie Montlhery(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1069년 이전 프랑스에서 Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1095년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William of Garlande nasceu antes 1045, em França, seu pai, Anseau Adam de Garlande, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie Montlhery, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery antes 1069, em França. Ele faleceu em 1095.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William of Garlande родился перед 1045 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Anseau Adam de Garlande было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie Montlhery, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery перед 1069 г. в местности Франция. Он умер в 1095 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William of Garlande nació antes de 1045, en Francia, su papá, Anseau Adam de Garlande, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Eustachie Montlhery, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Ne DE ROCHEFORT De Montlhery antes de 1069, en Francia. Murió en 1095.
